title: Tadeusz Kosciuszko and the River Forts
author: Roughdraft Stories
description: Tadeusz Kosciuszko came to America from the Polish-Lithuanian world with training in military engineering and a serious moral vision. This factual narrative follows his work at Saratoga and West Point, where earth, timber, and geometry helped shape the Revolutionary War.

chapters.title: From the Polish-Lithuanian World to America
